methods.description: The methodology employed in this study is a literature review. It provides a background and a timeline of dendrochronology, presents climatic, vegetation, and population data on semi-arid savanna ecosystems to provide a Namibian context, and summarizes dendrochronological research in Namibia.

steps.description: First, the study provided a background and a timeline of dendrochronology.
steps.searchable_summary: compile background and timeline of dendrochronology from existing literature

steps.description: The study presented the climatic, vegetation, and population on the semi-arid savanna ecosystems as a way to provide a Namibian context.
steps.searchable_summary: gather climatic, vegetation, and population data for semi-arid savanna ecosystems in Namibia
outputs: Namibian context for semi-arid savanna ecosystems

steps.description: In the results section, the first part presents a summary of dendrochronological researches carried out in Namibia in relation to their methods, species analyzed, regions covered, and their findings in terms of the tree ring observables.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze and summarize dendrochronological research in Namibia

steps.description: The second part presents the forecasted climatic regimes to show the importance of dendrochronology studies in the country.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze forecasted climatic regimes in Namibia
